steps.t: Hármelak suggested that you speak with the other leaders of the Kindred of the Coins in the main hall of Dâr Laja about the dangers their people will …
Jajax has some words for you in the Meeting-hall of Dâr Laja.
Hármelak is in the main hall of Dâr Laja, waiting to speak with you again.
The guardsman Jaith stands outside the Meeting-hall of Dâr Laja. Hármelak has asked that you warn him to keep watch in case Tatháta assaults the entra…
